title: ttsMP3.com_VoiceText_2026-4-24_23-52-1
transcript: We discussed the new dashboard feature. The team agreed to prioritize performance improvements. Alex will optimize database queries by Thursday. For year we'll redesign the UI components. We will launch the update next week.
summary: The team agreed to prioritize performance improvements for the new dashboard feature. Alex will optimize database queries by Thursday and redesign the UI components for the upcoming year, with the launch planned for next week.
action_items: Redesign UI components for the upcoming year
